summary: Iteration 100: Verified Service Desk UI enhancements - Pet Parent cards clickable with history modal, Pet Profile cards with links to Pet Parent, and Pet Soul Score ★ indicators. All features working correctly.

navigation.details: Pet Parents section accessible from sidebar, shows 25 total parents

card_display.details: Cards show parent name, email, phone, linked pets, and ticket count

card_clickable.details: Clicking card opens Pet Parent History Modal

history_modal.details: Modal shows Pets section and Ticket History with clickable tickets

navigation.details: Pet Profiles section accessible from sidebar, shows 28 total pets

card_display.details: Cards show pet name, breed, Soul Score percentage, and Pet Parent link

card_clickable.details: Clicking card opens pet profile in new tab at /pet/{pet_id}

parent_link.details: Clicking Pet Parent link (e.g., 'Dipali') opens Pet Parent History Modal

indicator_text.details: Shows 'Questions marked with ★ count towards your Pet's Soul Score'

star_display.details: ★ indicator appears next to questions that contribute to score (e.g., Temperament)

category_expansion.details: Categories expand to show questions with/without ★ indicators

pets_section.details: Shows linked pets with Soul Score badges, clickable to open pet profile

ticket_history.details: Shows ticket list with status badges, pillar tags, and dates

filter_button.details: Filter All Tickets button filters main ticket view by parent

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 100 verified Service Desk UI enhancements: 1) Pet Parents section (line 4433) - cards are clickable and open history modal showing pets and tickets. 2) Pet Profiles section (line 4520) - cards open pet profile in new tab, Pet Parent links open history modal. 3) Pet Soul Score ★ indicators in UnifiedPetPage.jsx - questions contributing to score show ★ symbol. All state variables (selectedParentForHistory, showParentHistoryModal) working correctly.

pet_parents_clickable_cards.functionality: Cards show parent info, clicking opens history modal with pets and tickets

pet_profiles_with_parent_links.functionality: Cards show pet info with Soul Score, clicking opens pet profile in new tab, parent link opens history modal

pet_parent_history_modal.functionality: Modal shows parent info, linked pets with Soul Score, ticket history, filter and close buttons

pet_soul_score_star_indicator.functionality: Questions contributing to Pet Soul Score show ★ indicator
